Indy Elite Exteriors started with a simple goal: to provide Indianapolis homeowners with honest, reliable roofing services. We saw too many contractors cutting corners, and we knew we could do better.

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our roofing contractor services.

How long does a roof replacement take?

Typically, a roof replacement takes 1-3 days, depending on the size and complexity of the roof, and weather conditions.

What type of roofing material is best for Indianapolis weather?

Asphalt shingles are a popular and cost-effective choice, offering good durability and resistance to wind and hail. Metal roofing is also a great option for superior longevity.

How do I know if I need a roof replacement?

Signs include widespread shingle damage, leaks, excessive granule loss, and an aging roof (20+ years old). A professional inspection can confirm the need for replacement.

Reviews From Our Roofing Contractor Customers

See what our satisfied customers have to say about their experience.

"Indy Elite Exteriors did an outstanding job replacing our roof after the hail storm. The crew was professional, efficient, and cleaned up everything perfectly. Our new roof looks fantastic, and we have peace of mind knowing it's built to last. Highly recommend!"

Sarah M. Roof Replacement

"We had a persistent leak in our roof, and Indy Elite Exteriors quickly identified and repaired the problem. They were responsive, professional, and the price was fair. I'd definitely use them again."

John K. Roof Repair

"Indy Elite Exteriors cleaned our gutters and did a fantastic job. They were thorough, efficient, and left no mess behind. Our gutters are now flowing freely, and we're ready for the spring rains."

Emily B. Gutter Cleaning
